shortCompanyReason: Join a well-established private dental practice.
shortRoleReason: Lead daily operations and ensure compliance in a senior role.
advertSummary: Synergy Dental Care is looking for an experienced Dental Practice Manager to oversee daily operations and ensure compliance with CQC standards. This senior leadership role offers the chance to take ownership of practice operations in a supportive environment.
personalisedIntro: As an experienced Dental Practice Manager, I am excited about the opportunity to lead operations at Synergy Dental Care. My background in managing compliance and team performance aligns perfectly with the needs of your established practice.
whyThisRole: This role is a strong fit for me as it allows me to leverage my extensive experience in dental practice management while ensuring high standards and compliance. I am eager to contribute to the efficiency and professionalism of your practice.
